system.description:
Mageslayers are specialist combatants who trade general battle proficiency for abilities lethal against spellcasters. Benefits of the Mageslayer. This partial Warrior class must join another partial class; no Mage class may pair with it, so it is usually a Partial Warrior/Mageslayer or Partial Expert/Mageslayer. Unlike normal Partial Warriors, Mageslayers receive neither a bonus combat Focus at first level nor +2 hit points per die, unless the other class is Warrior. All gain Magic-0 for understanding their prey. A spell is a learned power or Mage-class ability, including portable magic-item effects; passive qualities, Workings, innate powers, and divine magic are excluded.
